title: InVlate: Classic
description: Port of old versions of InVlate to 1.12.2.
body:
This mod adds several **types of ores**!
_Ambrosium ore appears only in the savannah._
The rest of the ores are found all over the world!
_Minerals and ingots_ are in fashion, you can make sets of armor and tools of different protection and durability!
You can also use the mineral "_Vurmazium_" and the stone "_Mibronium_" to make the best armor - _Vurtank armor_, as well as Oramb and Ender Pearls to make the _Sword of End_!
After that, the player can defeat the **Pladead boss** and make the Padead armor - the best armor. 
**InVlate: Classic** adds _balanced_ armor, which you still have to try to get! 
**The best replacement for Netherite Armor mods!**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4TFTgfaJQ8U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Official port of InVlate 1.0 to 1.12.2 to celebrate InVlate's 1st anniversary!
